creator: andy@demos.su
text:
ahd0: <Adaptec AIC7902 Ultra320 SCSI adapter> port 0x2400-0x24ff,0x2000-0x20ff mem 0xf8c00000-0xf8c01fff irq 16 at device 4.0 on pci13

On boot:
(probe131:ahd0:0:5:0): inquiry data fails comparison at DV1 step
(probe131:ahd0:0:5:0): inquiry data fails comparison at DV1 step
(probe131:ahd0:0:5:0): inquiry data fails comparison at DV1 step
(probe131:ahd0:0:5:0): inquiry data fails comparison at DV1 step
(probe131:ahd0:0:5:0): inquiry data fails comparison at DV1 step

External RAID failed to 6.600MB/s transfers (16bit),
under FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE worked as SCSI-4 device at 160.000MB/s.

How-To-Repeat: Connect any external SCSI RAID to 7.1 box
